{{Quote|This world may not have much, but it does have the meanest predators this side of the Galactic Rim. A hunters paradise.|translated=1|Fazza speaking of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Fazza Utral''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] hunter. As the proprietor of the [[Hunting Lodge]] of [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]], Fazza provided [[wraid]] and [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragon]] hunters with a location for buying supplies, a market for their goods, and a place to relax and share tales.<ref name="KOTOR" />

Most of what he sold hunters was weaponry, ranging from standard [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and [[Fragmentation grenade/Legends|fragmentation grenades]] to land mines, [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbines]], and heavy assault guns for the big prizes. He would also buy strange hunting prizes from fellow hunters; once he tried to purchase a [[Krayt dragon pearl/Legends|krayt dragon pearl]] from [[Revan/Legends|Revan]].<ref name="KOTOR" />
